sql: WITH base_data AS ( SELECT u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.department, o.id as order_id, o.amount, o.status as order_status, o.created_at, p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, p.category, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( (PARTITION BY u.id ORDER BY o.amount DESC OR PARTITION BY u.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC OR PARTITION BY u.id ORDER BY o.id) ) as order_rank, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY u.id) as user_order_count, SUM(o.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY u.id) as user_total_amount, AVG(o.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY u.id) as user_avg_amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id LEFT JOIN order_products op ON o.id = op.order_id LEFT JOIN products p ON op.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE o.created_at >= #{startDate} AND o.created_at <= #{endDate} AND u.status = #{userStatus} AND o.status IN #{os} AND c.id IN #{cid} ), summary AS ( SELECT department, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as user_count, SUM(amount) as total_amount, AVG(amount) as avg_amount, MAX(amount) as max_amount, MIN(amount) as min_amount, COUNT(order_id) as order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT category_id) as category_count FROM base_data GROUP BY department ), ranked AS ( SELECT bd.*, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY bd.user_total_amount DESC) as amount_rank, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY bd.user_order_count DESC) as frequency_rank FROM base_data bd WHERE bd.order_rank = 1 ) SELECT r.user_id, r.user_name, r.department, r.user_order_count, r.user_total_amount, r.user_avg_amount, r.amount_rank, r.frequency_rank, s.total_amount as dept_total, s.avg_amount as dept_avg, s.category_count FROM ranked r JOIN summary s ON r.department = s.department WHERE r.user_order_count >= #{minOrderCount} AND r.department = #{deptFilter} (ORDER BY r.user_total_amount DESC OR ORDER BY r.user_order_count DESC OR ORDER BY r.user_id) LIMIT #{limit}
templateSql:
WITH
        base_data AS (
            SELECT
                u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.department,
                o.id as order_id, o.amount, o.status as order_status, o.created_at,
                p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, p.category,
                c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    <choose>
                        <when test="rankBy == 'amount'">PARTITION BY u.id ORDER BY o.amount DESC</when>
                        <when test="rankBy == 'date'">PARTITION BY u.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC</when>
                        <otherwise>PARTITION BY u.id ORDER BY o.id</otherwise>
                    </choose>
                ) as order_rank,
                COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY u.id) as user_order_count,
                SUM(o.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY u.id) as user_total_amount,
                AVG(o.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY u.id) as user_avg_amount
            FROM users u
            LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
            LEFT JOIN order_products op ON o.id = op.order_id
            LEFT JOIN products p ON op.product_id = p.id
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
            <where>
                <if test="startDate != null">
                    AND o.created_at >= #{startDate}
                </if>
                <if test="endDate != null">
                    AND o.created_at <= #{endDate}
                </if>
                <if test="userStatus != null">
                    AND u.status = #{userStatus}
                </if>
                <if test="orderStatusList != null and orderStatusList.size() > 0">
                    AND o.status IN
                    <foreach collection="orderStatusList" item="os" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                        #{os}
                    </foreach>
                </if>
                <if test="categoryIds != null and categoryIds.size() > 0">
                    AND c.id IN
                    <foreach collection="categoryIds" item="cid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                        #{cid}
                    </foreach>
                </if>
            </where>
        ),
        summary AS (
            SELECT
                department,
                COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as user_count,
                SUM(amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(amount) as avg_amount,
                MAX(amount) as max_amount,
                MIN(amount) as min_amount,
                COUNT(order_id) as order_count,
                COUNT(DISTINCT category_id) as category_count
            FROM base_data
            GROUP BY department
        ),
        ranked AS (
            SELECT
                bd.*,
                RANK() OVER (ORDER BY bd.user_total_amount DESC) as amount_rank,
                DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY bd.user_order_count DESC) as frequency_rank
            FROM base_data bd
            WHERE bd.order_rank = 1
        )
        SELECT
            r.user_id, r.user_name, r.department,
            r.user_order_count, r.user_total_amount, r.user_avg_amount,
            r.amount_rank, r.frequency_rank,
            s.total_amount as dept_total, s.avg_amount as dept_avg,
            s.category_count
        FROM ranked r
        JOIN summary s ON r.department = s.department
        <if test="minOrderCount != null">
            WHERE r.user_order_count >= #{minOrderCount}
        </if>
        <if test="deptFilter != null">
            AND r.department = #{deptFilter}
        </if>
        <choose>
            <when test="sortBy == 'amount'">
                ORDER BY r.user_total_amount DESC
            </when>
            <when test="sortBy == 'frequency'">
                ORDER BY r.user_order_count DESC
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                ORDER BY r.user_id
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
        <if test="limit != null">
            LIMIT #{limit}
        </if>
